nvidia-cutlass-dsl==4.4.1
# rtp-kernel is built per-arch, so this x86_64 wheel carries a different build
# timestamp than the aarch64 one in requirements_cuda12_arm.txt. Keep both pins
# on the SAME source commit (currently 125c29e5) and bump + regenerate both
# lockfiles together, otherwise a one-sided regen would silently ship mismatched
# rtp-kernel builds across architectures.
rtp-kernel @ https://rtp-opensource.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/rtp_llm/simple/rtp-kernel/rtp_kernel-0.1.0%2B125c29e5.20260422154605-cp310-cp310-linux_x86_64.whl ; platform_machine == "x86_64"
tabulate==0.9.0
tensorrt==10.3.0 ; platform_machine == "x86_64"
tensorrt-cu12-bindings==10.3.0 ; platform_machine == "x86_64"
tensorrt-cu12-libs==10.3.0 ; platform_machine == "x86_64"
tilelang==0.1.6
torch==2.8.0+cu129
torchvision==0.23.0+cu129
